nasb.text: Then God said, “Let the waters teem with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth in the open expanse of the heavens.”

esv.text: And God said, “Let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the expanse of the heavens.”

cnv.text: 神說：“水要滋長生物；地上和天空之中，要有雀鳥飛翔！”

ccb.text: 上帝说：“水中要充满各种动物，空中要有禽鸟飞翔。”

csbs.text: 神说：“让水中充满成群的活物，让飞鸟在大地之上、在天上的穹苍中飞翔。”
